title: EasyCraft
description: This mod is created for those who want to survive in a limited area. Therefore, I made this mod to help make survival easier.
body:
This mod is created for those who want to survive in a limited area. Therefore, I made this mod to help make survival easier.

For example, you are surviving on a deserted island but you need bamboo. and your goal is not to go beyond the borders of this island. Then this mod comes in handy for you.

This mod adds not only crafting.

For example, bamboo dye crafts and more.

However, it can also help in the ordinary world.
